items.title:
[正面] 玩法概念類似slay the spire,但玩起來很不一樣.
牌組總共有4種不同的流派(渾沌、深海、...
items.summary:
玩法概念類似slay the spire,但玩起來很不一樣.
牌組總共有4種不同的流派(渾沌、深海、血肉、超維),每種流派都有自己的特殊機制.
例如深海的特殊機制是召喚觸手打人,很多牌的能力就是召喚、強化觸手或是用觸手讓敵人中毒等等,總之可玩性意外的高.
敘事方面也設計的非常精妙,有抓到克蘇魯的味道,遊玩起來很舒服.
10/10

items.title:
[正面] For a Gatcha game, it is good.
There is not a hug...
items.summary:
For a Gatcha game, it is good.
There is not a huge pressure to buy for progress, I am F2P and am having a good time with it. Very goth, psycho-horror, and abstract trauma fantasy in its design; it plays well together and creates some beautiful art for the card system and setting. Also progress and player growth is well balanced so far, no big/slow hurdles to grind yet; 3 chapter/45+ missions in.

I like that it lets me build a diverse set of teams with characters I like, there seems to be very few, if any, characters to avoid or ones that do not receive enough dev attention to be viable. My best teams are Defense and Healing; on route to make a Poison team. 

Translation needs some work, it's done by AI. There are certain terms that get stuck between 2-3 translations like "Easily Hurt" and "fragile, amongst several other key words needed for understanding. Definitly playable and understandable but will slow down your ability to breakdown and optimize abilities.
